scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @file-tracker/web" "npm run dev -w @file-tracker/api"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n web,desktop -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev -w @file-tracker/desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @file-tracker/web && npm run build -w @file-tracker/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @file-tracker/web && npm run lint -w @file-tracker/api
